name: Ratatouille Quiche
recipeIngredient: 1 large tomato, peeled and cut into 8 wedges
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Brush the inside of the pie shell with egg white and refrigerate.
3. In a hot skillet, sauté green peppers, onion, garlic, zucchini, and eggplant in oil until tender (about 5 minutes), stirring frequently. Season with salt and pepper.
4. Place tomato wedges on top and simmer, covered, over low heat for 5 minutes.
5. Sprinkle cheese evenly over the bottom of the pie shell.
6. In a medium bowl, beat eggs with half and half, salt, nutmeg, and pepper until combined but not frothy.
7. Arrange vegetables attractively over the cheese, then pour egg mixture over top.
8. Bake for 35 minutes or until the custard is puffy and set in the center. Cool on a wire rack for 10 minutes before serving.
9. Serve warm, sprinkled with parsley.
Makes 8 servings.
